channel.title: Data and Information :: CS Two Year Refactor
channel.description: Represent Information I can select and apply appropriate representations for information within computational systems. I organize and model information in ways that support effective storage, communication, analysis, and processing. Manage Data Resources I can acquire, store, transform, and integrate data from multiple sources to support computational goals. I work with structured and unstructured data using appropriate technologies, formats, and workflows. Investigate Questions with Data I can use computational and statistical methods to investigate questions and evaluate evidence.
